package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "crypto/md5"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for weak_crypto: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Direct use of weak standard-library crypto packages such as crypto/md5, crypto/sha1, crypto/des, and crypto/rc4.
type CaseWeakCryptoDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseWeakCryptoModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseWeakCryptoRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseWeakCryptoModel
}

type CaseWeakCryptoService struct {
    repo *CaseWeakCryptoRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseWeakCryptoAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveWeakCrypto(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseWeakCryptoDTO) error {
    focus := "weak_crypto"
    _ = focus
    _ = md5.Sum([]byte(input))
    weak_crypto_positive := map[string]int{"weak": 1, "crypto": 2}
    weak_crypto_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    weak_positive_0 := weak_crypto_positive["weak"] + len(input)
    _ = weak_positive_0
    crypto_positive_1 := map[string]string{"crypto": input}
    _ = crypto_positive_1
    return nil
}
